code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test05-JUN-2019Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), but no evidence of infection (negative nitrites/leukocytes). Low HbA1c excludes chronic hyperglycemia. Findings are consistent with acute or chronic kidney dysfunction, possibly with tubular involvement. Recommend further nephrological evaluation.
